---
title: "CNV_paper_scRNA-seq analyses"
author: "Joseph L. Horder"
date: "2025-10-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(svglite)
library(scCustomize)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(Matrix)
library(ggrepel)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(scTenifoldKnk)
library(msigdbr)
```

```{r}
# Read in RDS of seurat object.
CNV_data <- readRDS("../output/Robjects/00_CNV_raw_norm_batch_object.rds")
```

```{r}
# Read in tsne data
tsne_data <- read.table("../data/Mouse_eye_tSNE_table.csv", 
                        sep = ",",
                        header = TRUE,
                        row.names = 1)
```

```{r}
# add tsne dims from publication
tsne_dims <- tsne_data[c("Dim1", "Dim2")]

CNV_data <- AddMetaData(CNV_data, tsne_dims)

tsne_coordinates <- CNV_data@meta.data %>%
  rownames_to_column("barcodes") %>%
  dplyr::select(barcodes, tsne1 = Dim1, tsne2 = Dim2) %>%
  column_to_rownames("barcodes")

tsne_coordinates$tsne1 <- as.numeric(tsne_coordinates$tsne1, length = 4)
tsne_coordinates$tsne2 <- as.numeric(tsne_coordinates$tsne2, length = 4)

# format as matrix
tsne_coordinates_mat <- as(tsne_coordinates, "matrix")

# Create DimReduc and add to object
CNV_data[['tsne_pub']] <- CreateDimReducObject(embeddings = tsne_coordinates_mat, key = "tsne_", global = T, assay = "RNA")
```

```{r}
# T-SNE plot showing the clusters
DimPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, reduction = "tsne_pub", group.by = "Cluster")
ggsave("../output/plots/00_tsne_clusters.svg", width = 7, height = 5)

# T-SNE plot showing the CNV/healthy groups
DimPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, reduction = "tsne_pub", group.by = "Condition", label = FALSE)
ggsave("../output/plots/01_tsne_condition.svg", width = 7, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# Feature plot of ZEB1
FeaturePlot_scCustom(CNV_data, features = "Zeb1")
ggsave("../output/plots/02_zeb1_featureplot.svg", width = 7, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# Density plot
Plot_Density_Custom(CNV_data, features = "Zeb1")
ggsave("../output/plots/03_zeb1_density.svg", width = 7, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# Violin plot of Zeb1 across cell phenotypes.
VlnPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, features = "Zeb1", group.by = "Cluster") & NoLegend()
ggsave("../output/plots/15_zeb1_violin_phenotypes.svg", width = 7, height = 5)

# Violin plot of Zeb1 across lesion and non-lesion.
VlnPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, features = "Zeb1", group.by = "CNVECs.vs.CECs") & NoLegend()
ggsave("../output/plots/16_zeb1_violin_lesion_nonlesion.svg", width = 7, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# Specify the order that cell phenotypes are shown in plots.
Idents(CNV_data) <- "Cluster"

CNV_data$Cluster <- factor(CNV_data$Cluster, levels = c("tip cell",
                                                        "proliferating",
                                                        "neophalanx",
                                                        "immature",
                                                        "CNV transitioning",
                                                        "venule",
                                                        "vein shear stress",
                                                        "postcapillary veins",
                                                        "PCV activated",
                                                        "large veins",
                                                        "large arteries",
                                                        "capillary outer c.c.",
                                                        "capillary inner c.c.",
                                                        "artery shear stress",
                                                        "artery activated",
                                                        "arterioles",
                                                        "lymphatics",
                                                        "lymphatic-like"))
```

```{r}
# Dotplot of EMT/EndoMT, Endothelial and Mesenchymal markers.
# In p1, the dot.min = 0.01 specifies to only show dots on the plot that have
# a minimum expression of 1%, as showing dots for 0% expressing I find to be
# more difficult to interpret. HOWEVER, if you specify dot.min you cant then
# specify scale.max, which in this case resulted in the max scale to be 75%.
# Make p2, using scale.max. Then, in a figure editor remove dots that have <1%
# expressed by using p1 as a guide. BE CAREFUL AND BE ACCURATE.
# ALSO - the min percent for the DE analysis with FindAllMarkers is 0.01, so
# this aligns with the dotplot.
p1 <- DotPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                        "Zeb2",
                                        "Snai1",
                                        "Snai2",
                                        "Twist1",
                                        "Twist2",
                                        "Pecam1",
                                        "Cdh5",
                                        "Tagln",
                                        "Fn1",
                                        "Serpine1"),
                 x_lab_rotate = TRUE, scale.by = "radius", dot.min = 0.01)

p2 <- DotPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                        "Zeb2",
                                        "Snai1",
                                        "Snai2",
                                        "Twist1",
                                        "Twist2",
                                        "Pecam1",
                                        "Cdh5",
                                        "Tagln",
                                        "Fn1",
                                        "Serpine1"),
                 x_lab_rotate = TRUE, scale.by = "radius", scale.max = 100)
p1
p2

ggsave("../output/plots/04_endomt_dot.svg", width = 6, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# Perform all marker analysis between cell phenotypes (Cluster)
CNV_data_markers <- FindAllMarkers(CNV_data)
CNV_data_markers_table <- CNV_data_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)

write.csv(CNV_data_markers_table, file = "../output/data/00_DEGs_supp.csv")
```

```{r}
# Perform marker analysis FOR ENDOMT genes between cell phenotypes (Cluster)
CNV_data_markers_endomt <- FindAllMarkers(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                        "Zeb2",
                                        "Snai1",
                                        "Snai2",
                                        "Twist1",
                                        "Twist2",
                                        "Pecam1",
                                        "Cdh5",
                                        "Tagln",
                                        "Fn1",
                                        "Serpine1"))
CNV_data_markers_table_endomt <- CNV_data_markers_endomt %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)

write.csv(CNV_data_markers_table_endomt, file = "../output/data/01_endomt_DEGs_supp.csv")
```

```{r}
# Generate a dotplot of log2FC values for ENDOMT genes DE analysis.
# Custom colour scale for expression/log2FC on plots
colfunc <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "gray60", "red"))

# Set the order of the clusters
CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$cluster <- factor(CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$cluster, levels =  c("tip cell",
                                                        "proliferating",
                                                        "neophalanx",
                                                        "immature",
                                                        "CNV transitioning",
                                                        "venule",
                                                        "vein shear stress",
                                                        "postcapillary veins",
                                                        "PCV activated",
                                                        "large veins",
                                                        "large arteries",
                                                        "capillary outer c.c.",
                                                        "capillary inner c.c.",
                                                        "artery shear stress",
                                                        "artery activated",
                                                        "arterioles",
                                                        "lymphatics",
                                                        "lymphatic-like"))

CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$gene <- factor(CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$gene, levels =  c("Zeb1",
                                        "Zeb2",
                                        "Snai1",
                                        "Snai2",
                                        "Twist1",
                                        "Twist2",
                                        "Pecam1",
                                        "Cdh5",
                                        "Tagln",
                                        "Fn1",
                                        "Serpine1"))

# Change adjusted p_value of 0 to 1e-300 to be logged.
CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$p_val_adj <- ifelse(CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$p_val_adj == 0, 1e-300, CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$p_val_adj)

# Plot the DE analysis data for EndoMT genes.
ggplot(CNV_data_markers_table_endomt, aes(x = gene, y = cluster, fill = avg_log2FC, size = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, stroke = 0.4, 
             aes(color = ifelse(avg_log2FC > 0, "red", "blue"))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
    name = "log2(Fold change)", midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(min(CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$avg_log2FC), max(CNV_data_markers_table_endomt$avg_log2FC)),
    oob = scales::squish
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +  # Use the specified colors directly for edges
  scale_size(name = "-log10(p-value)") +
  ggtitle("") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

ggsave("../output/plots/05_EndoMT_log2FC.svg", width = 6, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 320)
```

```{r}
# Dotplot of Zeb1 and canonical markers.
# In p3, the dot.min = 0.01 specifies to only show dots on the plot that have
# a minimum expression of 1%, as showing dots for 0% expressing I find to be
# more difficult to interpret. HOWEVER, if you specify dot.min you cant then
# specify scale.max, which in this case resulted in the max scale to be 75%.
# Make p4, using scale.max. Then, in a figure editor remove dots that have <1%
# expressed by using p3 as a guide. BE CAREFUL AND BE ACCURATE.
# ALSO - the min percent for the DE analysis with FindAllMarkers is 0.01, so
# this aligns with the dotplot.
p3 <- DotPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                              "Tie1",
                                              "Tek",
                                              "Angpt2",
                                              "Kdr",
                                              "Nrp1",
                                              "Nrp2",
                                              "Dll4",
                                              "Jag1",
                                              "Esm1",
                                              "Cxcr4",
                                              "Foxo1",
                                              "Myc"),
                 x_lab_rotate = TRUE, scale.by = "radius", dot.min = 0.01)

p4 <- DotPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                              "Tie1",
                                              "Tek",
                                              "Angpt2",
                                              "Kdr",
                                              "Nrp1",
                                              "Nrp2",
                                              "Dll4",
                                              "Jag1",
                                              "Esm1",
                                              "Cxcr4",
                                              "Foxo1",
                                              "Myc"),
                 x_lab_rotate = TRUE, scale.by = "radius", scale.max = 100)
p3
p4

ggsave("../output/plots/06_canonical_dot.svg", width = 6.5, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# Perform marker analysis FOR CANONICAL GENES ONLY between cell phenotypes (Cluster)
CNV_data_markers_canonical <- FindAllMarkers(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                              "Tie1",
                                              "Tek",
                                              "Angpt2",
                                              "Kdr",
                                              "Nrp1",
                                              "Nrp2",
                                              "Dll4",
                                              "Jag1",
                                              "Esm1",
                                              "Cxcr4",
                                              "Foxo1",
                                              "Myc"))
CNV_data_markers_table_canonical <- CNV_data_markers_canonical %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)

write.csv(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical, file = "../output/data/02_canonical_DEGs_supp.csv")
```

```{r}
# Generate a dotplot of log2FC values.
# Custom colour scale for expression/log2FC on plots
colfunc <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "gray60", "red"))

# Set the order of the clusters
CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$cluster <- factor(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$cluster, levels =  c("tip cell",
                                                        "proliferating",
                                                        "neophalanx",
                                                        "immature",
                                                        "CNV transitioning",
                                                        "venule",
                                                        "vein shear stress",
                                                        "postcapillary veins",
                                                        "PCV activated",
                                                        "large veins",
                                                        "large arteries",
                                                        "capillary outer c.c.",
                                                        "capillary inner c.c.",
                                                        "artery shear stress",
                                                        "artery activated",
                                                        "arterioles",
                                                        "lymphatics",
                                                        "lymphatic-like"))

CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$gene <- factor(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$gene, levels =  c("Zeb1",
                                              "Tie1",
                                              "Tek",
                                              "Angpt2",
                                              "Kdr",
                                              "Nrp1",
                                              "Nrp2",
                                              "Dll4",
                                              "Jag1",
                                              "Esm1",
                                              "Cxcr4",
                                              "Foxo1",
                                              "Myc"))

# Change adjusted p_value of 0 to 1e-300 to be logged.
CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$p_val_adj <- ifelse(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$p_val_adj == 0, 1e-300, CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$p_val_adj)

# Plot the DE analysis data for EndoMT genes.
ggplot(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical, aes(x = gene, y = cluster, fill = avg_log2FC, size = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, stroke = 0.4, 
             aes(color = ifelse(avg_log2FC > 0, "red", "blue"))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
    name = "log2(Fold change)", midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(min(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$avg_log2FC), max(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$avg_log2FC)),
    oob = scales::squish
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +  # Use the specified colors directly for edges
  scale_size(name = "-log10(p-value)") +
  ggtitle("") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

ggsave("../output/plots/07_canonical_log2FC.svg", width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 320)
```

```{r}
# Expression dotplot of endomt and canonical genes combined.
DotPlot_scCustom(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                        "Zeb2",
                                        "Snai1",
                                        "Snai2",
                                        "Twist1",
                                        "Twist2",
                                        "Pecam1",
                                        "Cdh5",
                                        "Tagln",
                                        "Fn1",
                                        "Serpine1",
                                        "Tie1",
                                        "Tek",
                                        "Angpt2",
                                        "Kdr",
                                        "Nrp1",
                                        "Nrp2",
                                        "Dll4",
                                        "Jag1",
                                        "Esm1",
                                        "Cxcr4",
                                        "Foxo1",
                                        "Myc"),
                 x_lab_rotate = TRUE, scale.by = "radius", scale.max = 100)

ggsave("../output/plots/08_endomt_canonical_dot.svg", width = 8.5, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# Generate DE results for the EndoMT AND canonical genes.
# In order to plot a single dotplot of results rather than 2 separate.
CNV_data_endomt_canonical <- FindAllMarkers(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                        "Zeb2",
                                        "Snai1",
                                        "Snai2",
                                        "Twist1",
                                        "Twist2",
                                        "Pecam1",
                                        "Cdh5",
                                        "Tagln",
                                        "Fn1",
                                        "Serpine1",
                                        "Tie1",
                                        "Tek",
                                        "Angpt2",
                                        "Kdr",
                                        "Nrp1",
                                        "Nrp2",
                                        "Dll4",
                                        "Jag1",
                                        "Esm1",
                                        "Cxcr4",
                                        "Foxo1",
                                        "Myc"))

CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table <- CNV_data_endomt_canonical %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)

write.csv(CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table, file = "../output/data/03_EndoMT_canonical_DEGs_supp.csv")
```

```{r}
# Dotplot of endomt and canonical combined.

# Set the order of the clusters
CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table$cluster <- factor(CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table$cluster, levels =  c("tip cell",
                                                        "proliferating",
                                                        "neophalanx",
                                                        "immature",
                                                        "CNV transitioning",
                                                        "venule",
                                                        "vein shear stress",
                                                        "postcapillary veins",
                                                        "PCV activated",
                                                        "large veins",
                                                        "large arteries",
                                                        "capillary outer c.c.",
                                                        "capillary inner c.c.",
                                                        "artery shear stress",
                                                        "artery activated",
                                                        "arterioles",
                                                        "lymphatics",
                                                        "lymphatic-like"))

CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table$gene <- factor(CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table$gene, levels =  c("Zeb1",
                                        "Zeb2",
                                        "Snai1",
                                        "Snai2",
                                        "Twist1",
                                        "Twist2",
                                        "Pecam1",
                                        "Cdh5",
                                        "Tagln",
                                        "Fn1",
                                        "Serpine1",
                                        "Tie1",
                                        "Tek",
                                        "Angpt2",
                                        "Kdr",
                                        "Nrp1",
                                        "Nrp2",
                                        "Dll4",
                                        "Jag1",
                                        "Esm1",
                                        "Cxcr4",
                                        "Foxo1",
                                        "Myc"))

# Change adjusted p_value of 0 to 1e-300 to be logged.
CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table$p_val_adj <- ifelse(CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table$p_val_adj == 0, 1e-300, CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table$p_val_adj)

# Plot the DE analysis data for EndoMT genes.
ggplot(CNV_data_endomt_canonical_table, aes(x = gene, y = cluster, fill = avg_log2FC, size = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, stroke = 0.4, 
             aes(color = ifelse(avg_log2FC > 0, "red", "blue"))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
    name = "log2(Fold change)", midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(min(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$avg_log2FC), max(CNV_data_markers_table_canonical$avg_log2FC)),
    oob = scales::squish
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +  # Use the specified colors directly for edges
  scale_size(name = "-log10(p-value)") +
  ggtitle("") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

ggsave("../output/plots/09_endomt_canonical_log2FC.svg", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 320)
```

```{r}
# Find markers between CNVECs and CECs for all genes.
Idents(CNV_data) <- "CNVECs.vs.CECs"

CNV_data_markers_lesionvsnonlesion <- FindAllMarkers(CNV_data)
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion <- CNV_data_markers_lesionvsnonlesion %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)

write.csv(CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion, file = "../output/data/04_DEGs_lesionvsnonlesion_supp.csv")

Idents(CNV_data) <- "Cluster"
```

```{r}
# Find markers between lesion (CNVECs) and non-lesion (CECs) for EndoMT + canonical genes.
Idents(CNV_data) <- "CNVECs.vs.CECs"

CNV_data_markers_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt <- FindAllMarkers(CNV_data, features = c("Zeb1",
                                        "Zeb2",
                                        "Snai1",
                                        "Snai2",
                                        "Twist1",
                                        "Twist2",
                                        "Pecam1",
                                        "Cdh5",
                                        "Tagln",
                                        "Fn1",
                                        "Serpine1",
                                        "Tie1",
                                        "Tek",
                                        "Angpt2",
                                        "Kdr",
                                        "Nrp1",
                                        "Nrp2",
                                        "Dll4",
                                        "Jag1",
                                        "Esm1",
                                        "Cxcr4",
                                        "Foxo1",
                                        "Myc"))
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_table_endomt <- CNV_data_markers_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)

write.csv(CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_table_endomt, file = "../output/data/05_EndoMT_canonical_DEGs_lesionvsnonlesion_supp.csv")

Idents(CNV_data) <- "Cluster"
```

```{r}
# Create a volcano plot to represent lesion vs non-lesion ECs for EndoMT + canonical DEGs

# subset DEG data for CNVECs (lesion) only.
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs <- CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_table_endomt[CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_table_endomt$cluster == 'CNVECs',]

# Adjust for 0 p-values
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$p_val_adj <- ifelse(CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$p_val_adj == 0, 1e-300, CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$p_val_adj)

# Define colors
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$color <- "darkgrey"
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$color[CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$p_val_adj < 0.05 & CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$avg_log2FC > 0.01] <- "#ffada9"
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$color[CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$p_val_adj < 0.05 & CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$avg_log2FC < -0.01] <- "dodgerblue"

# Define caps for axes
cap_y <- 300
cap_x <- 6

# Cap the values in the data for plotting
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$plot_y <- pmin(-log10(CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$p_val_adj), cap_y)
CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$plot_x <- pmin(abs(CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$avg_log2FC), cap_x) * sign(CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs$avg_log2FC)

# Define the base plot
base_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs, aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y, color = color), size = 3) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = CNV_data_markers_table_lesionvsnonlesion_endomt_CNVECs,
    aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y, label = gene),
    size = 3, color = "black", max.overlaps = 50, box.padding = 0.4,
    segment.size = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype='dashed', col = 'darkgrey') +
  labs(
    x = "log2(Fold Change)",
    y = "-log10(Adjusted p-value)"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

base_plot

# Save the plot
ggsave(
  filename = "../output/plots/10_endomt_lesionvsnonlesion_volcano.svg",
  plot = base_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 4,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 320
)
```

```{r}
# Extract percent expressing information for Zeb1 across phenotypes.
```

```{r}
# Create a subset of lesion cells
lesion_cells <- subset(CNV_data, idents = c("proliferating",
                                                        "tip cell",
                                                        "CNV transitioning",
                                                        "immature",
                                                        "neophalanx"))

# Save the lesion EC subset
saveRDS(lesion_cells,"../output/Robjects/01_lesion_cells_subset.rds")
```

```{r}
# Run ZEB1 KO - NOTE! Best do this on 128Gb RAM computer. Requires power.
print("Making matrix")
exp.matrix <- lesion_cells[["RNA"]]$counts
exp.matrix <- exp.matrix[rowMeans(exp.matrix !=0) > 0.1,]
writeMM(exp.matrix, 'WT.mtx')
writeLines(rownames(exp.matrix), 'genesWT.txt')
writeLines(colnames(exp.matrix), 'barcodesWT.txt')

WT <- readMM('WT.mtx')
rownames(WT) <- readLines('genesWT.txt')
colnames(WT) <- readLines('barcodesWT.txt')
WT <- WT[rowMeans(WT != 0) > 0.05,]
WT <- WT[!grepl('^Rp[[:digit:]]+|^Rpl|^Rps|^Mt-', rownames(WT), ignore.case = TRUE),]

print("Running in silico KO")
lesion_ZEB1_KO <- scTenifoldKnk(WT, qc = TRUE, qc_minLSize = 0, gKO = 'Zeb1', nCores = 10)

print("Save in silico KO")
save(lesion_ZEB1_KO, file = '../output/Robjects/02_cnv_lesion_zeb1KO.RData')
```

```{r}
# Read in the in-silico KO data
load('../output/Robjects/02_cnv_lesion_zeb1KO.RData')
```

```{r}
# Extract the differential regulation results from in-silico Zeb1 KO.
write.csv(CNVECs_ZEB1_KO$diffRegulation, "../output/data/06_cnv_lesion_zeb1KO_DRGs.csv")
DR <- CNVECs_ZEB1_KO$diffRegulation
# DR$symbol <- mapIds(org.Mm.eg.db, keys = DR$gene, column = "SYMBOL", keytype = "ENSEMBL")

# Extract only the significant results.
DR_sig <- DR %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05)
```

```{r}
# Create a plot to demonstrate the in-silico KO results. Top 10 DR genes
# Add log2FC column and adjust for 0 p-values
DR$log2FC <- log2(DR$FC)
DR$p.adj <- ifelse(DR$p.adj == 0, 1e-300, DR$p.adj)

# Create a color category column for significant genes
DR$color <- "darkgrey" # Default color
DR$color[DR$p.adj < 0.05] <- "#ffada9" # Significant genes

# Add labels only for significant genes of interest. Top 10 DR in this case
DR$label <- ifelse(DR$gene %in% c("Zeb1",
                                  "Tk1",
                                  "Gmnn",
                                  "Mcm5",
                                  "Fosl2",
                                  "Jund",
                                  "Apold1",
                                  "Rrm1",
                                  "Junb",
                                  "Fosb",
                                  "Zfp36"), DR$gene, "")

# Define axis caps
cap_y <- 30
cap_x <- 8
DR$plot_y <- pmin(-log10(DR$p.adj), cap_y)
DR$plot_x <- pmin(abs(DR$log2FC), cap_x) * sign(DR$log2FC)

# Separate data for Zeb1, green points, and other points
zeb1_point <- DR[DR$gene == "Zeb1", ]
other_points <- DR[!(DR$gene == "Zeb1"),]

# Plot
ggplot() +
  # Plot other points first
  geom_point(data = other_points, aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y, color = color), size = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
  # Plot lightgreen and darkgreen points on top
  # Highlight Zeb1 as a red triangle
  geom_point(data = zeb1_point, aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), color = "red", shape = 2, size = 2) +
  # Add gene labels for EndoMT markers
  geom_text_repel(
    data = other_points[other_points$label != "", ],
    aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y, label = label),
    size = 3, color = "black", max.overlaps = 50, box.padding = 0.4,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    segment.size = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  labs(
    x = "log2(Fold Change)",
    y = "-log10(Adjusted p-value)",
    title = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic()

# Save the plot
ggsave(
  filename = "../output/plots/11_zeb1_KO_TOP_genes.svg",
  width = 8,
  height = 10,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 320
)
```

```{r}
# Perform functional enrichment analysis of the significant predicted DR genes against GO.
Zeb1KOego <- enrichGO(
    gene          = DR_sig$gene,
    OrgDb         = org.Mm.eg.db,
    keyType       = "SYMBOL",
    ont           = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    qvalueCutoff  = 0.05,
    readable      = TRUE
)

simpleZeb1KOego <- clusterProfiler::simplify(Zeb1KOego, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min)

write.csv(simpleZeb1KOego@result, file = "../output/data/07_zeb1_KO_GO.csv")
```

```{r}
# Perform functional enrichment analysis of the significant predicted DR genes against KEGG.
zeb1_KO_genes_entrez <- bitr(DR_sig$gene, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID",
                             OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")

ekeggZeb1KO <- enrichKEGG(
    gene = zeb1_KO_genes_entrez$ENTREZID,
    organism      = 'mmu',
    keyType       = "kegg",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    qvalueCutoff  = 0.05)

ekeggZeb1KO <- setReadable(ekeggZeb1KO, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID")

ekeggZeb1KO@result$Description <- gsub(pattern = " - Mus musculus (house mouse)", replacement = "", ekeggZeb1KO@result$Description, fixed = T)

write.csv(ekeggZeb1KO@result, file = "../output/data/08_zeb1_KO_KEGG.csv")
```

```{r}
# Perform functional enrichment analysis of DR genes against HALLMARKS
# Retrieve the sets of hallmarks data. Refine the data.
m_t2g <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", collection = "H") %>% 
  dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)
head(m_t2g)

zeb1_ko_genes <- zeb1_KO_genes_entrez$SYMBOL

dr_hallmarks <- enricher(zeb1_ko_genes, TERM2GENE = m_t2g, qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
dr_hallmarks <- dr_hallmarks@result %>%
  dplyr::filter(qvalue < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(qvalue)
head(dr_hallmarks)

write.csv(dr_hallmarks, file = "../output/data/09_zeb1_KO_HALLMARKS.csv")
```

```{r}
# Dotplot of combined functional enrichment results for inflammation-related results
# First, combine the data together.
GO <- as.data.frame(simpleZeb1KOego@result)
KEGG <- as.data.frame(ekeggZeb1KO@result)
HALL <- as.data.frame(dr_hallmarks)

GO$Type <- "GO"
KEGG$Type <- "KEGG"
HALL$Type <- "HALLMARKS"

# Concatenate ID and Description for GO and KEGG
GO <- GO %>%
  mutate(Description = paste0(Description, " ", "(", ID, ")"))

KEGG <- KEGG %>%
  mutate(Description = paste0(Description, " ", "(", ID, ")"))
KEGG <- KEGG[, !(names(KEGG) %in% c("category", "subcategory"))]

all_res <- bind_rows(GO, KEGG, HALL)

selected_terms <- c("HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB",
                    "regulation of inflammatory response (GO:0050727)",
                    "cellular response to interleukin-17 (GO:0097398)",
                    "response to interleukin-17 (GO:0097396)",
                    "transforming growth factor beta receptor superfamily signaling pathway (GO:0141091)",
                    "cellular response to transforming growth factor beta stimulus (GO:0071560)",
                    "regulation of tumor necrosis factor production (GO:0032680)",
                    "response to transforming growth factor beta (GO:0071559)",
                    "inflammatory response to antigenic stimulus (GO:0002437)",
                    "cellular response to interleukin-1 (GO:0071347)",
                    "inflammatory response to wounding (GO:0090594)",
                    "response to interleukin-1 (GO:0070555)",
                    "JAK-STAT signaling pathway (mmu04630)",
                    "IL-17 signaling pathway (mmu04657)",
                    "MAPK signaling pathway (mmu04010)",
                    "TNF signaling pathway (mmu04668)")

# Filter selected pathways by Description
plot_data <- all_res %>%
  filter(Description %in% selected_terms)

# Create readable labels
plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  mutate(Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(unique(Description))))

# Convert GeneRatio to numeric
plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  separate(GeneRatio, into = c("x", "y"), sep = "/") %>%
  mutate(GeneRatioNumeric = as.numeric(x) / as.numeric(y))

# Ensure key columns are numeric
plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  mutate(
    p.adjust = as.numeric(p.adjust),
    Count    = as.numeric(Count))

# Order the y axis by significance for each database
plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  arrange(p.adjust, Description) %>%
  mutate(Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(unique(Description))))

# Make dotplot
p <- ggplot(
  plot_data,
  aes(x = GeneRatioNumeric, y = Description, size = Count, color = p.adjust)
) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient(high = "#327eba", low = "#e06663", name = "p.adjust") +
  guides(color = guide_colorbar(reverse = TRUE)) +  # red = more significant at top of legend
  scale_size_continuous(breaks = c(5,10,15,20,25,30), range=c(3,10)) +
  labs(x = "Gene Ratio", y = NULL, title = "") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10)
  )

print(p)
ggsave(
  plot = p,
  filename = "../output/plots/17_zeb1_KO_funenrich_inflamm.svg",
  width = 25,
  height = 10,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 320
)
```


```{r}
# Genes related to inflammation were extracted from the inflammation-related
# results from the functional enrichment analyses.
# This resulted in 53 genes out of 133 total DR from ZEB1 in-silico KO to be 
# related to inflammation. See data file "10_inflammation_genes_from_enrichmentanalyses.txt"

inflam_genes <- c("Akap12",
"Arid5a",
"Atf3",
"Bhlhe40",
"Bmpr2",
"Btg2",
"Casp4",
"Ccnl1",
"Cd200",
"Cdkn1a",
"Dusp1",
"Egr1",
"Errfi1",
"Fos",
"Fosb",
"Fosl2",
"Gadd45g",
"Hbegf",
"Hmgb2",
"Ier2",
"Ier3",
"Jun",
"Junb",
"Jund",
"Kdm6b",
"Klf4",
"Klf6",
"Klf9",
"Lifr",
"Lrrc32",
"Mcl1",
"Nfkbia",
"Nfkbiz",
"Nr4a1",
"Nr4a2",
"Osmr",
"Pde4b",
"Pim1",
"Pnrc1",
"Ppp1r15a",
"Prkcg",
"Sat1",
"Sgk1",
"Sik1",
"Socs3",
"Spry1",
"Stat3",
"Stmn1",
"Trib1",
"Uaca",
"Zbtb20",
"Zeb1",
"Zfp36")
```

```{r}
# Gather inflammation related genes from GO, KEGG and HALLMARKS results.
# Also get a list of inflammation related genes from the top hierarchy of inflammation GO terms.
# Create a plot to demonstrate the in-silico KO results. Inflammation related.
# Add log2FC column and adjust for 0 p-values
DR$log2FC <- log2(DR$FC)
DR$p.adj <- ifelse(DR$p.adj == 0, 1e-300, DR$p.adj)

# Create a color category column for significant genes
DR$color <- "darkgrey" # Default color
DR$color[DR$p.adj < 0.05] <- "#ffada9" # Significant genes

# Add labels only for significant genes of interest. In this case inflammation related.
DR$label <- ifelse(DR$gene %in% inflam_genes, DR$gene, "")

# Define axis caps
cap_y <- 30
cap_x <- 8
DR$plot_y <- pmin(-log10(DR$p.adj), cap_y)
DR$plot_x <- pmin(abs(DR$log2FC), cap_x) * sign(DR$log2FC)

# Separate data for Zeb1, green points, and other points
zeb1_point <- DR[DR$gene == "Zeb1", ]
other_points <- DR[!(DR$gene == "Zeb1"),]

# Plot
ggplot() +
  # Plot other points first
  geom_point(data = other_points, aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y, color = color), size = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
  # Plot lightgreen and darkgreen points on top
  # Highlight Zeb1 as a red triangle
  geom_point(data = zeb1_point, aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), color = "red", shape = 2, size = 2) +
  # Add gene labels for EndoMT markers
  geom_text_repel(
    data = other_points[other_points$label != "", ],
    aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y, label = label),
    size = 4, color = "black", max.overlaps = 50, box.padding = 0.4,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    segment.size = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  labs(
    x = "log2(Fold Change)",
    y = "-log10(Adjusted p-value)",
    title = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic()

# Save the plot
ggsave(
  filename = "../output/plots/12_zeb1_KO_inflammation_genes.svg",
  width = 15,
  height = 30,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 320
)
```

```{r}
# Extracting percent expressing data (proportion of Zeb1+ cells)
zeb1_proportions <- Percent_Expressing(CNV_data, features = "Zeb1")

# Tidy and rearrange the data.
zeb1_proportions_tidy <- zeb1_proportions %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("celltype") %>%
  mutate(Zeb1 = as.numeric(Zeb1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Zeb1))

write.csv(zeb1_proportions_tidy, file = "../output/data/11_zeb1_proportions.csv")
```

```{r}
# Make a bar plot of the percent expressing Zeb1.

# Define lesion (red) cell types
lesion_types <- c("tip.cell", "proliferating", "CNV.transitioning", "immature", "neophalanx")

# Prepare data
zeb1_proportions_tidy <- zeb1_proportions_tidy %>%
  mutate(color_group = ifelse(celltype %in% lesion_types, "Lesion", "Non-lesion")) %>%
  mutate(celltype = factor(celltype, levels = celltype[order(Zeb1, decreasing = FALSE)]))

# Plot
ggplot(zeb1_proportions_tidy, aes(x = celltype, y = Zeb1, fill = color_group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", Zeb1)),
            hjust = -0.2, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Lesion" = "#F4A6A6", "Non-lesion" = "#A6C8F4"),
    name = NULL   # legend title can be added if you prefer
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "top"   # change to "right", "bottom", etc. if preferred
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Cell type",
    y = "Percent expressing Zeb1",
    title = "Zeb1 expression across CNV cell types"
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  ylim(0, 100)

# Save the plot
ggsave(
  filename = "../output/plots/13_zeb1_proportions_cell_types.svg",
  width = 15,
  height = 15,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 320
)
```

```{r}
# Get proportions, but for lesion and non-lesion
Idents(CNV_data) <- "CNVECs.vs.CECs"

# Extracting percent expressing data (proportion of Zeb1+ cells)
zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion <- Percent_Expressing(CNV_data, features = "Zeb1")

Idents(CNV_data) <- "Cluster"

# Tidy and rearrange the data.
zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion_tidy <- zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("celltype") %>%
  mutate(Zeb1 = as.numeric(Zeb1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Zeb1))

write.csv(zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion_tidy, file = "../output/data/12_zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion.csv")
```

```{r}
# Make a bar plot of the percent expressing Zeb1.

# Define lesion (red) cell types
lesion_types <- c("CNVECs")

# Prepare data
zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion_tidy <- zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion_tidy %>%
  mutate(color_group = ifelse(celltype %in% lesion_types, "Lesion", "Non-lesion")) %>%
  mutate(celltype = factor(celltype, levels = celltype[order(Zeb1, decreasing = FALSE)]))

# Plot
ggplot(zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion_tidy, aes(x = celltype, y = Zeb1, fill = color_group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", Zeb1)),
            hjust = -0.2, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Lesion" = "#F4A6A6", "Non-lesion" = "#A6C8F4"),
    name = NULL   # legend title can be added if you prefer
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Cell type",
    y = "Percent expressing Zeb1",
    title = "Zeb1 expression across CNV cell types"
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  ylim(0, 100)

# Save the plot
ggsave(
  filename = "../output/plots/14_zeb1_proportions_lesion_nonlesion.svg",
  width = 15,
  height = 7,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 320
)
```

```{r}
# The violin plots suggest that although tip cells have the greatest proportion
# of Zeb1+ cells, capillary cells that DO express Zeb1 might have a higher expression.
# We can check this with setting Zeb1 expression status (+/-) and then analysing
# the zeb1+ cells.

# A conclusion to draw could be: Zeb1 expression is needed in lesion ECs, hence
# more cells express it. HOWEVER, capillary cells that do express Zeb1 (24%)
# display a higher average expression. Why? What are these cells doing that need Zeb1?
# STAIN CAPILLARIES - which capillary ECs express Zeb1?

# Add meta data for Zeb1+ and Zeb1-
# Create a data frame for Zeb1 data
A <- data.frame(
  Zeb1 = FetchData(CNV_data, vars = "Zeb1")[[1]],
  ColCell = colnames(CNV_data)
)

# Initialize the counter to gather Zeb1+ and Zeb1- data
Zeb1.counter <- rep("other", nrow(A))

# Iterate through rows to classify Zeb1 status
for (i in 1:nrow(A)) {
  if (A[i, "Zeb1"] != 0) {
    Zeb1.counter[i] <- "Zeb1+"
  } else if ((A[i, "Zeb1"] == 0)) {
    Zeb1.counter[i] <- "Zeb1-"
  }
}

# Add Zeb1 status as metadata to the Seurat object
CNV_data <- AddMetaData(CNV_data, Zeb1.counter, col.name = "Zeb1.counter")

# 21,734 Zeb1- and 6,603 Zeb1+ cells in dataset.
```

```{r}
# Seurat object of Zeb1+ cells by subsetting.
zeb1_CNV_data <- subset(CNV_data, subset = Zeb1 > 0)
```

```{r}
# Violin plot of Zeb1 across cell phenotypes.
VlnPlot_scCustom(zeb1_CNV_data, features = "Zeb1", group.by = "Cluster", plot_median = TRUE) & NoLegend()

# Violin plot of Zeb1 across lesion and non-lesion.
VlnPlot_scCustom(zeb1_CNV_data, features = "Zeb1", group.by = "CNVECs.vs.CECs", plot_median = TRUE) & NoLegend()
```

```{r}
# Get the average expression of Zeb1 in Zeb1+ cells.
av_ex <- as.data.frame(AverageExpression(zeb1_CNV_data, features = "Zeb1", group.by = "Cluster", assays = "RNA")) %>%
  t()
write.csv(av_ex, file = "../output/data/13_zeb1_average_expression_Zeb1PosCells.csv")

# Average expression of Zeb1 in all cells.
av_ex_all <- as.data.frame(AverageExpression(CNV_data, features = "Zeb1", group.by = "Cluster", assays = "RNA")) %>%
  t()
write.csv(av_ex, file = "../output/data/14_zeb1_average_expression_all_cells.csv")
```

```{r}
# Why do non-lesion cells that express Zeb1 express it at a higher level than lesion ECs?
# Even though Zeb1 is more widely expressed in legion ECs.
# What is Zeb1 doing in non-lesion ECs when it is expressed?
# Is there a difference between healthy and CNV cells?
```

```{r}
# Zeb1+ vs Zeb1- DE analysis in all cells in the dataset
Idents(CNV_data) <- "Zeb1.counter"
Zeb1DEtable <- FindMarkers(CNV_data, ident.1 = "Zeb1+", ident.2 = "Zeb1-", logfc.threshold = 0)
Zeb1DEtable_sig <- Zeb1DEtable %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)
write.csv(Zeb1DEtable_sig, file = "../output/data/15_zeb1pos_vs_zeb1neg_DE.csv")
```

```{r}
# Add meta data for Zeb1+ and Zeb1- in the lesion subset
# Create a data frame for Zeb1 data
B <- data.frame(
  Zeb1 = FetchData(lesion_cells, vars = "Zeb1")[[1]],
  ColCell = colnames(lesion_cells)
)

# Initialize the counter to gather Zeb1+ and Zeb1- data
Zeb1.counter <- rep("other", nrow(B))

# Iterate through rows to classify Zeb1 status
for (i in 1:nrow(B)) {
  if (B[i, "Zeb1"] != 0) {
    Zeb1.counter[i] <- "Zeb1+"
  } else if ((B[i, "Zeb1"] == 0)) {
    Zeb1.counter[i] <- "Zeb1-"
  }
}

# Add Zeb1 status as metadata to the Seurat object
lesion_cells <- AddMetaData(lesion_cells, Zeb1.counter, col.name = "Zeb1.counter")
```

```{r}
# Zeb1+ vs Zeb1- DE analysis in lesion cells
Idents(lesion_cells) <- "Zeb1.counter"
Zeb1DEtable_lesion <- FindMarkers(lesion_cells, ident.1 = "Zeb1+", ident.2 = "Zeb1-", logfc.threshold = 0)
Zeb1DEtable_sig_lesion <- Zeb1DEtable_lesion %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)
write.csv(Zeb1DEtable_sig_lesion, file = "../output/data/16_zeb1pos_vs_zeb1neg_DE_lesion.csv")
```

```{r}
# Create a subset of non-lesion cells
nonlesion_cells <- subset(CNV_data, idents = c("proliferating",
                                                        "tip cell",
                                                        "CNV transitioning",
                                                        "immature",
                                                        "neophalanx"),
                          invert = TRUE)

# Save the lesion EC subset
saveRDS(nonlesion_cells,"../output/Robjects/03_nonlesion_cells_subset.rds")
```

```{r}
# Add meta data for Zeb1+ and Zeb1- in the non-lesion subset (it should already be there).
# Create a data frame for Zeb1 data
C <- data.frame(
  Zeb1 = FetchData(nonlesion_cells, vars = "Zeb1")[[1]],
  ColCell = colnames(nonlesion_cells)
)

# Initialize the counter to gather Zeb1+ and Zeb1- data
Zeb1.counter <- rep("other", nrow(C))

# Iterate through rows to classify Zeb1 status
for (i in 1:nrow(C)) {
  if (C[i, "Zeb1"] != 0) {
    Zeb1.counter[i] <- "Zeb1+"
  } else if ((C[i, "Zeb1"] == 0)) {
    Zeb1.counter[i] <- "Zeb1-"
  }
}

# Add Zeb1 status as metadata to the Seurat object
nonlesion_cells <- AddMetaData(nonlesion_cells, Zeb1.counter, col.name = "Zeb1.counter")
```

```{r}
# Zeb1+ vs Zeb1- DE analysis in lesion cells
Idents(nonlesion_cells) <- "Zeb1.counter"
Zeb1DEtable_nonlesion <- FindMarkers(nonlesion_cells, ident.1 = "Zeb1+", ident.2 = "Zeb1-", logfc.threshold = 0)
Zeb1DEtable_sig_nonlesion <- Zeb1DEtable_nonlesion %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)
write.csv(Zeb1DEtable_sig_nonlesion, file = "../output/data/17_zeb1pos_vs_zeb1neg_DE_nonlesion.csv")
```

```{r}
# Zeb1+ vs Zeb1- DE analysis in tip cells only
# Get tip cell subset
Idents(CNV_data) <- "Cluster"
tip_cells <- subset(CNV_data, idents = "tip cell")

# Zeb1+ vs Zeb1- DE analysis in tip cells
Idents(tip_cells) <- "Zeb1.counter"
Zeb1DEtable_tip <- FindMarkers(tip_cells, ident.1 = "Zeb1+", ident.2 = "Zeb1-", logfc.threshold = 0)
Zeb1DEtable_tip_sig <- Zeb1DEtable_tip %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05)
write.csv(Zeb1DEtable_tip_sig, file = "../output/data/18_zeb1pos_vs_zeb1neg_DE_tipcells.csv")
```
